title: Add voice input support for queries
author: Product Team
description: Allow users to submit queries using voice input instead of only text input. This would improve accessibility and user experience, especially for users with mobility constraints or those who prefer voice interaction.
acceptance_criteria: Voice input button in user interface
Support for common browsers and devices
Fallback to text input if voice fails
implementation_notes: Consider using Web Speech API for browser compatibility. May need to evaluate third-party services for better accuracy.
testing_requirements: Performance testing with different audio qualities
